description: Compliance audit for KP Cisco C9500-40X Alpha v1
name: KP C9500-40X Compliance Baseline Alpha v1

value: ^aaa authentication login default group tacacs\+ local$
^aaa authentication enable default group tacacs\+ enable$
^aaa accounting exec default start-stop group tacacs\+$
^aaa accounting commands 1 default start-stop group tacacs\+$
^aaa accounting commands 15 default start-stop group tacacs\+$
^aaa accounting system default start-stop group tacacs\+$
^aaa authorization exec default group tacacs\+( local)? if-authenticated
^aaa authorization commands 1 default group tacacs\+( local)? if-authenticated
^aaa authorization commands 15 default group tacacs\+( local)? if-authenticated
^WILL RESULT IN PROSECUTION TO THE FULLEST$
^service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime show-timezone$
^service timestamps log datetime msec localtime show-timezone$

rules.name: Extra-service-timestamps-debug
rules.description: service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime show-timezone

value: ^service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime show-timezone$

rules.name: Extra-service-timestamps-log
rules.description: service timestamps log datetime msec localtime show-timezone

value: ^service timestamps log datetime msec localtime show-timezone$

rules.name: Extra-hostname-set
rules.description: hostname must be configured (any non-empty value)

rules.name: Extra-boot-system-packages-conf
rules.description: boot system switch all flash:packages.conf (install-mode boot)

rules.name: Extra-no-login-on-success-log
rules.description: no login on-success log must be configured

rules.name: Extra-spanning-tree-loopguard-default
rules.description: spanning-tree loopguard default must be configured

rules.name: Extra-spanning-tree-portfast-bpduguard-default
rules.description: spanning-tree portfast bpduguard default must be configured

rules.name: Extra-errdisable-recovery-cause-udld
rules.description: errdisable recovery cause udld must be configured

rules.name: Extra-errdisable-recovery-cause-link-flap
rules.description: errdisable recovery cause link-flap must be configured

rules.name: Extra-ip-default-gateway-set
rules.description: ip default-gateway must be configured (any non-empty value)

rules.name: Extra-ip-tcp-synwait-time-5
rules.description: ip tcp synwait-time 5 must be configured
